author: kevaundray
content: Only these two for the guest program -- though its mainly the first one

author: jsign
content: <@628018527470616606>, I'm working now to have set up infra to easily configure EL branch to run all execution witness construction fixtures. But after that I'll do the same for guest program eest fixtures run, so we can have more clear view on how different stateful and stateless ELs pass on relevant fixtures. I'll keep everyone more up to date on how these integrations will work.

author: lukaszrozmej
content: Sure, currently <@1328762375255359632> is focusing on benchmark integration (bit problem of outdated zisk in benchmarks) and <@912415191067676693> is focusing on eest integration, currently in this branch: https://github.com/NethermindEth/nethermind/pull/11625

author: jsign
content:
<@912415191067676693>, do you have plans to add a `engine_newPayloadWithWitnessV5`? 
(Basically same output as without witness, but has a `witness` field which is a blob with the RLP-encoded execution witness. (Whenever all the SSZ proposal settle, we'll also support the corresponding SSZ endpoint but for now targeting normal engine rpcs)). 

This is the only requirement so that we can include Nethermind in the upcoming execution witness generation fixtures runner, since we run all the tests via Hive. (i.e. `blockchain_test_engine` style).

author: lukaszrozmej
content: <@774033563732541451> we are working on adding this endpoint in https://github.com/NethermindEth/nethermind/pull/11623
